summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse clip: a short, cinematic trailer-style hype edit promoting a UFC 'FIGHT NIGHT' on the White House South Lawn for America's 250th. It intercuts dramatic black title cards in thin serif type ('PRESIDENT DONALD T...', 'THE WHITE HOUSE') with two muscular UFC fighters in suits squaring off on the South Lawn before the White House, plus glossy hero shots of a UFC 'FREEDOM 250' belt and program covered in stars and stripes. Music-driven with no dialogue, it uses fight-promo and movie-trailer aesthetics to make a presidential event feel like a blockbuster sporting spectacle for a young, hype-driven audience.

script.scene: Black screen with faint thin-serif title text resolving (reads like 'President Donald T...'), trailer-style cold open over music.
Two muscular UFC fighters in fitted suits (navy and tan) stand side by side on the South Lawn, White House behind them, gazing off heroically.
The fighters turn to a tense face-off on the lawn, White House and red-brick building behind.
Glossy close-up of a UFC 'FREEDOM 250' booklet with stars logo, then a gold UFC championship belt with a stars-and-stripes faceplate, overlaid with faint trailer text.
Black title card with line-drawn emblem and bold 'THE WHITE HOUSE' to close.

notable_text: RT @WhiteHouse: 'America's epic 250 summer loading... @UFC FIGHT NIGHT ON THE SOUTH LAWN'
